description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The admin role is configured with the following permissions: `can_freeze_controller`, `can_unfreeze_controller`, `can_manage_permissions`, `can_suspend_permissions`, `can_manage_reserves_and_integrations`, `can_invoke_external_transfer`. This role can grant and revoke any role, including itself and all other roles defined in the contract. The admin role is also used for general admin functions in all contracts. This role is fully controlled by Sky Governance via the Keel Proxy.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
